differentials.name: Mucoepidermoid Carcinoma ◊  typically originate from minor salivary glands of buccal mucosa

differentials.name: may present with chin numbness ← involvement of inferior alveolar nerve
differentials.raw: may present with chin numbness ← involvement of inferior alveolar nerve

context: Histo:   poorly differentiated epithelial + clear cells √  diffuse honeycomb-like radiolucent lesion √  surrounding cortical destruction Prognosis:   high rate of recurrence √  aggressive features of cortical destruction, extraosseous extension, extensive solid components Histo:   osteo~, chondro~, fibro~, leiomyosarcoma √  symmetrically widened periodontal membrane in a single tooth (earliest sign of osteogenic sarcoma of mandible)
